title: Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Cropin Asia Pacific Associates:
Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin Asia Pacific Associates!
